name: F4 Thailand: Boys Over Flowers
original_name: หัวใจรักสี่ดวงดาว
overview: Gorya, a girl from a poor family, is happy to enter an elite high school. However, things take a turn when she is bullied by a group of rich spoiled boys called F4.

trailers.title: GMMTV 2021 | F4 THAILAND : BOYS OVER FLOWERS
